titleStmt.title: SII 22.488: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 488.

summary.p: Records the remission of taxes in favour of the fishermen living in the new street at Kammadurgamu by the mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nārasiṁha-rājayyadēva-mahārāju of Nandyāla. In characters of the 16th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bahudhānya saṁvatsara ĀṣāḍaThe four lettersĀṣāḍa ba 13lū are written above the line.ba 13 lū śrīman mahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara naṁdyala nāraśiṁhvarājayyadēva
mahārājuluṁgāru bestavāriki yicina
kommadu¨rgaṁlōnu krottagānu kaṭina vīdhilōnu
yiṁḍlu kaṭukoni kāpuraṁ vuṁḍēṭaṁdulaku mali
yēmiṁnni mīku Aṁnu pannūlēkuṁḍanu sa¨rpamā
nyaṁ śēsināraṁ mīru marīyēmaṁnni vicāriṁccaka
Ā vīdhilōnu yiṁḍlu kaṭukoni mīrāya koluśēsu ko
ni sukhāna vuṁḍēdi vēṭivēma Aṁnu paṁnu ba
ḍi sa¨rvamānyaṁgāmaṁnisti maṁ biḍla bi
ḍa taraṁ sūryacaṁdrādula galaṁta gālaṁ sukhā
na badhikuladiśrayaḥ pariguripiyaḥ
cavvaṇa bōyaninagaya koḍukaku potayyarāju
gāriki vinnapaṁ sēśi sa¨rvvamānyaṁgānu śēyiṁcci śāsanaṁ
vēyiṁcināru kanaka mīru kulaṁvāru potana bōIniki
bavu manaśa biḍabiḍataramunu bahumānana naḍupu koni
Digital edition of SII 22.488 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
